motivation: Confirm/reject hypothesis from D4 pivot post-mortem: is A2-Orch the regression driver?

context.d4_pivot: A2-Tool retrain with mixed corpus FAILED (0.5722 vs target 0.85, only +0.0055 over baseline)
context.prior_hypothesis: A2-Orch's Orch-OR consciousness loss (phi_holo_consistency_weight=0.01) is the regression driver — hardest hit on email(0.37)/schedule(0.20) due to Korean register loss
context.test: Serve A1_merged_base_20260416 WITHOUT A2-Orch or A2-Tool adapters; measure hire_sim_lenient 30-task score

method.eval: hexa run training/deploy/hire_sim_lenient.hexa (same 30-task stratified corpus as D4)

qualitative_smoke.korean_prompt: 안녕하세요. 오늘 일정을 세 가지로 간단히 정리해 주세요.
qualitative_smoke.english_response_snippet: 法国巴黎La de estic en laidad elaist del yación teal que daandoado elaciones de to 1-75 02:36Alex What I hearing something there The we on me Alex art in neural?
qualitative_smoke.verdict: Severely degraded — incoherent in both Korean and English; mixes CJK + Latin + digits + Unicode replacement chars; loses instruction-following entirely

three_way_comparison.config: A1 + A2-Orch + A2-Tool (D3 baseline, prior production)
A1 + A2-Orch + A2-Tool-MIXED (D4 pivot, mixed corpus retrain)
r9 + path-c reference (lenient baseline, proven good)
three_way_comparison.lineage: different from D3/D4 chain — NOT directly comparable but upper bound target

hypothesis_verdict.original_hypothesis: A2-Orch is the regression driver (Orch-OR phi_holo_consistency_weight=0.01 damages Korean register fidelity)
evidence: A1-only avg_score (0.0778) is 7.3x WORSE than A1+A2-Orch+A2-Tool (0.5667)
A1-only completion_rate (0.0000) vs full chain (0.4333) — full chain is NOT regressing toward A1, it is COMPENSATING for A1
A1-only produces gibberish in both Korean and English — instruction-following fully broken
A2-Orch is therefore ADDITIVE (not subtractive) relative to A1 for Korean hire-sim tasks
hypothesis_verdict.revised_hypothesis: A1 LoRA training itself damaged Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct's base instruction-following capability. A2-Orch is masking this damage, not causing it. The 0.56 plateau reflects the ceiling of what A2-Orch+A2-Tool can recover on top of a damaged A1 base.

recommended_next_pivot.recommendation: Drop the A1 adapter entirely. Train A2-Orch + A2-Tool DIRECTLY on Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct (no A1 merge) OR rebuild A1 with gentler hyperparams.

path_A_skip_A1.train_order: A2-Orch first (consciousness signal), then A2-Tool on top (hire-sim domain)
path_A_skip_A1.rationale: A1 is now known-bad. Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct is known-good (chat works). Skip the damaged step.
path_A_skip_A1.cost_estimate: ~2x A2-Orch training cycle (~12h H100) + A2-Tool retrain (~2h) = ~$45

path_B_rebuild_A1_gentler.A1_config_proposed: lora_r 8 (from 16), alpha 16 (from 32), learning_rate 5e-5 (from 1e-4), dropout 0.1 (from 0), steps 500 (from ~2000), chat-template-preserving data mix
path_B_rebuild_A1_gentler.gate: after rebuild, A1-only hire_sim_lenient must score >= 0.40 before merging A2-Orch

path_C_abandon_lineage.action: Pivot to r9+pathc lineage (0.9444 proven) for production; keep A1/A2 lineage as research branch

recommended_next_pivot.recommended_path: path_C_abandon_lineage — cheapest + highest score. Fall back to path_A if r9+pathc is not production-ready.
do_not_do: Do NOT lower phi_holo_consistency_weight — A2-Orch is helping, not hurting
Do NOT retrain A2-Tool again — it already hit its ceiling on the damaged base
Do NOT resume A1 training — per feedback_no_resume_data_change

other_tracks_status_after_ablation.this_pod_state: restored to A1+A2-Orch+A2-Tool-mixed serving on port 8091 (tmux session serve_a2t_mixed)
